{
  "source_tables": [
    {
      "page": 36,
      "title": "Table 13A - Distribution of All Active Participants by Age and Length of Service (Average Annual Salary column only)",
      "row_labels": ["Under 25", "25-29", "30-34", "35-39", "40-44", "45-49", "50-54", "55-59", "60-64", "65 & Over"],
      "col_labels": ["Average Annual Salary"],
      "cells": [[40914], [49285], [57241], [65861], [73333], [75230], [77712], [76769], [75478], [78767]],
      "printed_row_totals": null,
      "printed_col_totals": null
    }
  ],
  "row_map": [
    {"target": "<25", "sources": ["Under 25"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "29", "sources": ["25-29"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "34", "sources": ["30-34"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "39", "sources": ["35-39"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "44", "sources": ["40-44"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "49", "sources": ["45-49"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "54", "sources": ["50-54"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "59", "sources": ["55-59"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "64", "sources": ["60-64"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "70", "sources": ["65 & Over"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null}
  ],
  "col_map": [
    {"target": "4", "sources": ["Average Annual Salary"], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "9", "sources": ["Average Annual Salary"], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "14", "sources": ["Average Annual Salary"], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "19", "sources": ["Average Annual Salary"], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "24", "sources": ["Average Annual Salary"], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "29", "sources": ["Average Annual Salary"], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "34", "sources": ["Average Annual Salary"], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "40", "sources": ["Average Annual Salary"], "op": "copy"}
  ],
  "derive": null,
  "transpose": false,
  "notes": "The document does not publish an average-salary-by-age-AND-service exhibit. Table 13A (page 36, All Active Participants by Age and Length of Service) provides only a single 'Average Annual Salary' column per age band (an age-only average, not broken out by service). No per-service-bin average salary or per-cell total salary exists in the document, so the service dimension cannot be resolved. I transcribed the age-band average salary column and mapped it by copying each age band's overall average into every target service column (an average cannot be split across service bins). Age band 65 & Over is mapped to target row '70'. If service detail is truly required and unavailable, these columns all carry the same age-band average. Only Table 13A (All participants) is used; Group A (13B) and Group B (13C) also print single average columns but summing/averaging them would require count weighting - the All-participants table already gives the combined average by age."
}
